steps.desc: submit a Leave request persists to db_workflow
clock in/out writes a punch to db_time
approve a pending request flips status in db_workflow + persists
hire a new employee persists to db_people (+ leave balance)
steps.info: hired EMP-0250 + leave balance · survived reload

steps.desc: advance a payroll run mutates db_payroll + persists
steps.info: PR-2026-06 advanced from step 1 · survived reload

steps.desc: send a broadcast writes to db_comms
db console add-row persists to db_people
generate a report run saves to dw_reports + persists
